data_description.site_name: Friendly name used in entities and dashboard cards.
data_description.latitude: Launch site latitude in decimal degrees.
data_description.longitude: Launch site longitude in decimal degrees.

data_description.flight_duration_min: Expected time in the air for one flight.
data_description.prep_time_min: Buffer before takeoff used for setup and checks.
data_description.update_interval_min: How often FlyNow refreshes forecast data.

data_description.max_surface_wind_ms: Maximum allowed wind near ground level.
data_description.max_altitude_wind_ms: Maximum allowed wind in balloon operating altitude.
data_description.max_precip_prob_pct: Maximum allowed rain probability in flight window.
data_description.min_visibility_km: Minimum required visibility for safe operation.

data_description.crew_notifier: Notify entity used for crew push notifications.
data_description.pilot_notifier: Notify entity used for pilot push notifications.
data_description.whatsapp_notifier: Notify entity routed to WhatsApp bridge.
data_description.calendar_entity: Calendar entity where FlyNow creates GO events.

error.single_site_only: Phase 1 supports one launch site only.
error.invalid_entity_id: Entity ID must match the expected domain.
